It probably still is. One actually... One other quick note on that too. The only thing I've heard of from Chris and a few other people, like, have talked about, which I think is valid, is I think the only time Chris ever gets in trouble with his copy, and this isn't like a criticism, it's just like a thing I think he has to be aware of and he is now, but is if he just keeps punching you, right, and the punching the gut stuff, but then he doesn't ever throw you that rope or it takes a really long time. And I think if you were to ask him or other people, what he would say is this because, like, yeah, you wanted to do that punch in the gut emotional stuff, but you do want to then throw them the life raft afterwards. And so I think it's one thing to be aware of if you're going to try and imitate a lead like Chris has, is yes, that's awesome, but you do want to show them how there's, you know, a light at the end of the tunnel at some point and not make them wait like 20 minutes to find out that there's a light at the end of the tunnel.
